summary: Gate approval-flow configuration with RBAC and refine the sidebar settings experience while keeping frontend lint clean.

notes: Added approval_config as an independent RBAC resource.
Changed approval template table SELECT policies to require approval_config:read.
Changed psa_save_approval_template to require approval_config:write instead of admin-only access.
Seeded admin with approval_config:write and documented approval_config permission effects.
Approval Center now shows the approval-flow configuration tab through approval_config:read and supports read-only mode without approval_config:write.
Sidebar footer now shows user identity on wide layouts and moves logout into an anchored settings menu.
Theme selection now opens as a second-level settings menu with hover grace-area handling.
Resolved existing ESLint warnings by splitting non-component exports from React component modules and fixing AnalyticsTab hook dependencies.

verification: Run npm exec -- playwright test e2e/sidebar-menu-geometry.spec.ts --project=chromium from frontend/.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.17 after deployment.
Run scripts/smoke-approval-config-rbac.sql and scripts/assert-function-grants.sql on production after deployment.
